name: kalthraxius
comment:overrides: puppeteer-extra-plugin-user-data-dir pins rimraf@3 (→ glob@7 → inflight, a known memory leak). We override to rimraf@4, the newest major that (a) drops inflight entirely and (b) is still imported as a callable `require('rimraf')(path, opts, cb)` the way the plugin calls it. rimraf@5/6 export an object, not a function, and crash the plugin's cleanup at runtime ('rimraf is not a function'). rimraf@4 is promise-based so the plugin's debug-only callback never fires, but the directory IS deleted (verified). glob is pinned to ^9 (what rimraf@4 needs); glob still prints a self-deprecation notice on install but carries no actual advisory — going higher would force rimraf@6 and break the plugin. Transitive-only; we don't use rimraf/glob directly.
